Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Пам'ятаєш, коли ті хлопці вкрали мій гаманець, а ти прийшов мені на допомогу?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I don't like having to depend on other people... But it ended up happening anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Знаєш, я не могла тоді тобі це сказати, але...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Я насправді рада, що ти прийшов тоді.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Тож я хотіла тобі подякувати як слід.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Thanks for your help back then. I really appreciate it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 13 7 5 2}Well, well, look who's being so polite now. Ahaha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Whew! That's a big weight off my shoulders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}На даху не так багато людей буває, тож, думаю, це ідеальне місце для серйозних розмов.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}But... couples tend to sneak up here too. If anyone sees us, the rumor mill might go crazy again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Wouldn't that be annoying, {f 4 1}-kun? Y'know, if people assumed we were dating...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 13 7 5 2}Ahaha, really? I'm not sure if you're being brave or oblivious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Still, that's something special about you. You don't get bogged down by what other people think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I know, right? Rumors are seriously no joke.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 6 25 25}Коли всі побачили, як ми разом приходимо до школи, довелося дуже довго все роз'яснювати.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Achoo! Uh-oh, they say a sneeze means someone's talking about you. Well, it's probably nothing...[n]{f 1 1}
